childhood.familyBackground: Details of family background are not widely documented in English sources.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 가족 배경 세부사항은 영어 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.education: Studied at a Chinese university with a focus on pharmaceutical sciences.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in southern China during the economic reform era.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 경제 개혁 시대에 중국 남부에서 성장.

careerTimeline.event: Began career in pharmaceutical manufacturing in Zhuhai
Built Livzon Pharmaceutical into a major Chinese pharmaceutical company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 리브존 제약을 중국 주요 제약회사로 성장

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into biologics and innovative drug development
careerTimeline.eventKo: 바이오의약품 및 혁신 신약 개발로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Livzon became one of China's most valuable pharmaceutical companies
careerTimeline.eventKo: 리브존이 중국 최고가치 제약회사 중 하나로 부상

careerTimeline.event: Net worth reached $13.6 billion as pharmaceutical sector grew
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제약 부문 성장으로 순자산 136억 달러 도달

failures.description: Faced regulatory challenges during China's pharmaceutical industry reforms
failures.descriptionKo: 중국 제약 산업 개혁 중 규제 과제 직면
failures.lesson: Regulatory compliance and quality standards are paramount in pharmaceuticals
failures.lessonKo: 제약에서 규제 준수와 품질 기준이 가장 중요

quotes.text: Good medicine requires patience in research and dedication to quality.
quotes.textKo: 좋은 약은 연구의 인내와 품질에 대한 헌신이 필요하다.

personalTraits.knownFor: Building one of China's leading pharmaceutical companies with a focus on innovative drugs and biologics
personalTraits.knownForKo: 혁신 신약 및 바이오의약품에 집중하는 중국 선도 제약회사 중 하나 구축
